headline: Stocks Push Higher on US Labor Market Strength and AI Spending
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.24%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.26%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +0.29%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.20%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: These S&P500 stocks are moving in today's pre-market session
summary: The US market session of Tuesday has yet to be opened, let's have a look at the top S&P500 gainers and losers in the pre-market session today.

headline: Stock Index Futures Muted as Investors Parse Middle East Developments, U.S. JOLTS Report in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.14%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.01% this morning, taking a breather after a recent rally, while investors assess the prospects for an end to the Middle East conflict.
